site.name: Maker AI
site.tagline: Create product photos, product videos, and UGC-style ads for Shopify, Amazon, TikTok, and Instagram. One AI workspace with 16+ video models for ecommerce creative testing.

pages.title: Video Modes
pages.text:
# Maker AI - AI Product Photo, Video & Ad Generator for Ecommerce

Create product photos, product videos, and UGC-style ads for Shopify, Amazon, TikTok, and Instagram. One AI workspace with 16+ video models for ecommerce creative testing.

## Site basics
- Site ID: makerai
- Website: https://makerai.online
- Default locale: en
- Locales: en, de, fr, ja, ko, es, ar

## Public feature scope
- video gen
- image gen
- image inspiration
- avatar video
- pricing

## Official website
https://makerai.online
